text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I took the opportunity to observe your<n>training
methods today. Good work.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Your cooldown in particular is<n>something I'd like
to incorporate into<n>my own repertoire.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Which means I'll need to rework my<n>current
training regimen...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: If you'll excuse me, I have business<n>to tend to.
